mapper.select:
SELECT H.LOTNO, H.LOTHISTORYNO, H.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, H.LOTQTY, H.WORKORDNO, H.LINECD, H.PROCESSCD, H.MERGELOTNO, H.SEPARATELOTNO, H.LOTCREATIONDAY FROM TBL_PROD_LOTHISTORY H LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON H.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
1=1 AND H.LOTCREATIONDAY >= #{start_date} AND H.LOTCREATIONDAY <= #{end_date} AND H.LOTNO LIKE #{lot_no} AND (H.PARTNO LIKE #{part_no} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{part_no})
ORDER BY H.LOTCREATIONDAY DESC, H.LOTNO DESC, H.LOTHISTORYNO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT 'L' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(LOTNO,3) AS INT)),0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE WHERE LOTNO LIKE 'L' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE (LOTNO, PARTNO, LOTQTY, UNIT, WAREHOUSECODE, LOCATIONCODE, LOTCREATIONDAY, LOTTYPE, LOTSTATE, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, REMARK) VALUES (#{LOTNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{LOTQTY}, #{UNIT}, #{WAREHOUSECODE}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{LOTCREATIONDAY}, #{LOTTYPE}, 'CREATED', 1, GETDATE(), 1, GETDATE(), #{REMARK})

INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_LOTHISTORY (LOTNO, LOTHISTORYNO, PARTNO, LOTQTY, UNIT, WAREHOUSECODE, LOCATIONCODE, LOTCREATIONDAY, LOTTYPE, LOTSTATE, WORKORDNO, PROCESSCD, LINECD, SHIFT, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM) VALUES (#{LOTNO}, 1, #{PARTNO}, #{LOTQTY}, #{UNIT}, #{WAREHOUSECODE}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{LOTCREATIONDAY}, #{LOTTYPE}, 'CREATED', #{WORKORDNO}, #{PROCESSCD}, #{LINECD}, #{SHIFT}, 1, GETDATE(), 1, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT 1 AS DEPTH, H.LOTNO, H.LOTNO AS MAT_LOTNO, S.PARTNO AS PARTNO, G.PARTNM AS PARTNM, H.CHANGEDAY AS CREATIONDAY, G.UNIT AS UNIT, ABS(H.QTY) AS LOTQTY, H.STOCKCHANGEGUBUN AS REL_INFO, '' AS PROCESSCD, H.REF_NO AS REL_TARGET FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY H LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S ON H.LOTNO = S.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE (H.LOTNO = #{lotno} OR H.REF_NO = #{lotno}) ORDER BY H.CHANGEDAY DESC, H.STOCKHISTORYNO DESC

SELECT S.LOTNO, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, S.LOTQTY, S.UNIT, S.LOCATIONCODE FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE S.PARTNO = #{part_no} AND S.LOTQTY > 0 AND S.LOTSTATE != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY S.LOTCREATIONDAY ASC, S.LOTNO ASC
